optimized_viewsets.notes: Properly optimized with select_related for ForeignKey fields
Well-optimized for both FK and reverse FK relationships
Comprehensive select_related for multiple ForeignKey fields
Comprehensive optimization for audit trail relationships
Advanced Prefetch with nested select_related for members - best practice
Comprehensive optimization with both select and prefetch
Excellent - nested Prefetch with select_related for tasks
Well-optimized with nested select_related and prefetch
Good optimization for approval workflow relationships
No explicit select_related, but simple structure may be acceptable

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 42-79) has multiple N+1 issues. Filters by roles__organization without select_related(). Accesses related objects in filter conditions without optimization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('user') and prefetch_related('roles__organization') to get_queryset(). This will prevent queries when accessing user.email, user.username in serialization.

needs_optimization.problem: roles() action method (lines 200-212) queries UserOrganizationRole without optimization. Then serializes each role which may access related user/organization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add .select_related('user', 'organization') to the UserOrganizationRole query at line 205-209. Also add prefetch_related if accessing ManyToMany fields in serializer.

needs_optimization.problem: _is_admin() method (lines 360-371) is called in multiple action methods. It queries UserOrganizationRole.objects.filter() without select_related. Called multiple times per request.
needs_optimization.solution: Cache the result or use select_related when fetching the user initially. Alternatively, add the role check to main get_queryset() optimization.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 385-393) doesn't use select_related for user, organization, or assigned_by relationships.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('user__user', 'organization', 'assigned_by__user') to optimize ForeignKey access.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 442-466) filters by ordoc_user.organizations.all() which can be N+1 if this queryset is called multiple times. Line 456 uses .all() without prefetch.
needs_optimization.solution: Optimize organization fetching: Add prefetch_related('organization') when querying OrdocUser. Use 'organization_id__in' instead of 'organization__in' if possible.

needs_optimization.problem: affected_users() action method (lines 620-635) iterates through policy.users.all() and policy.user_groups.all() without prefetch. Then calls group.get_all_users() which may trigger additional queries per group.
needs_optimization.solution: Use prefetch_related('users', 'user_groups__users') in get_queryset(). Implement batch_related() if available or optimize get_all_users() method.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 676-684) doesn't use select_related for user and target_user relationships. These are accessed during serialization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('user__user', 'target_user__user', 'organization') to get_queryset().

needs_optimization.problem: by_user() action method (lines 687-706) and by_action() method (lines 709-726) use paginate_queryset() without prior optimization. Also user_counts values query (line 757) accesses related user__user__username without select_related.
needs_optimization.solution: Optimize the base queryset with select_related before these actions are called. Modify line 757 to use select_related.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 38-54) doesn't use select_related. Calls get_current_ordoc_user() which may query the database for ordoc_profile relationship.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('organization', 'created_by__user') to optimize ForeignKey relationships. Optimize get_current_ordoc_user() to use select_related.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 173-189) doesn't optimize template relationship. Line 185 filters by template__is_public without select_related. generate() method creates Report without eager loading.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('template__organization', 'generated_by__user', 'organization') to get_queryset().

needs_optimization.problem: stats() action method (lines 333-349) performs multiple aggregation queries on the same queryset without caching. Each value() call triggers a separate query.
needs_optimization.solution: Combine all aggregations into a single annotate() call using conditional expressions or separate the logic more efficiently.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 365-373) doesn't use select_related for template and created_by relationships.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('template__organization', 'created_by__user', 'organization').

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 456-469) filters by report__organization without select_related. Accesses report in serialization context.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('report__template', 'report__organization', 'shared_by__user') to optimize related object access.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 539-547) doesn't optimize relationships.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('organization', 'report_template__organization', 'report__organization').

needs_optimization.problem: dashboard() action method (lines 554-656) performs 16+ separate database queries without optimization. Lines 563-577 make independent queries for each metric. Lines 591-595, 621-625 access related objects without select_related.
needs_optimization.solution: Refactor to use a single optimized query with select_related() and annotate(). Cache common statistics. Consider moving to a service layer with batch queries.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 51-55) doesn't use select_related for organization and user relationships.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('organization', 'user__user').

needs_optimization.problem: post() method (lines 43-113) creates multiple DocumentAnalysis and ProactiveAlert objects in a loop (lines 92-104) without batch_create(). Each create() triggers a separate INSERT query.
needs_optimization.solution: Use bulk_create(alert_objects, batch_size=1000) instead of creating objects individually in loop at lines 93-104.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 169-226) doesn't use select_related for organization relationship. Line 181 queries UserOrganizationRole without optimization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('organization') to ProactiveAlert queryset. Optimize line 181 with select_related('user__user').

needs_optimization.problem: respond() action method (lines 229-269) creates KnowledgeFeedback object for each response without checking if it needs to create related alert objects.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related when fetching alert to avoid reload. Consider batch operations if multiple alerts are processed.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 315-319) doesn't use select_related for user and organization relationships.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('user__ordoc_profile__user', 'organization').

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 356-360) doesn't use select_related for requested_by relationship.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('requested_by__user', 'organization').

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 59-79) calls super().get_queryset() without optimization. Line 69 checks roles.filter() which queries database. No select_related for related objects.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related when needed. Cache the admin check or include it in base optimization.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method doesn't use select_related. tree() action method (lines 119-143) recursively builds tree structure by calling children.filter() for each department (line 136) - causes N+1 queries.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('organization', 'parent'). Use prefetch_related('children') and build tree with prefetched children.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() doesn't optimize. tree() action method (lines 226-249) has similar N+1 issue as DepartmentViewSet - builds tree recursively calling children.filter() for each directory.
needs_optimization.solution: Use prefetch_related('children') and flatten the tree building using prefetch_related with Prefetch().

needs_optimization.problem: stats() action method (lines 252-345) performs multiple count() queries (lines 263, 267, 271-277, 283) without aggregation. Each status check (line 281-285) queries documents separately.
needs_optimization.solution: Use annotate() with Count() and Case/When expressions to combine all counts in single query.

needs_optimization.problem: recommended() action method (lines 818-953) performs multiple loop iterations over task querysets without select_related/prefetch. Line 895 queries TaskAttachment.objects.filter(task__in=tasks) which can be N+1. Line 901-906 queries ProcedureDocument.
needs_optimization.solution: Prefetch all attachments and documents in single query. Use select_related('procedure__organization') for tasks. Consider moving to a service layer.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 379-454) doesn't use select_related for department__organization relationship. Line 399 filters documents by department__organization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('department__organization', 'created_by', 'parent_document') to get_queryset().

needs_optimization.problem: documents() action method (lines 1068-1077) queries documents without select_related for document relationships. Then serializes without optimization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('department__organization', 'created_by') before paginating.

needs_optimization.problem: suggestions() action method (lines 1363-1414) queries Document.objects without select_related. Then filters uncategorized documents and applies regex on each without batching.
needs_optimization.solution: Use values_list('name') initially, but add select_related if serializing full documents later.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 1090-1096) doesn't use select_related for user relationship. insights() action method (lines 1139-1188) aggregates without select_related, then accesses user__username in aggregation.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('user__user') to get_queryset(). Keep aggregation as-is since it doesn't fetch full objects.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() doesn't use select_related for document. by_token() action method (lines 1224-1244) queries without optimization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('document__department__organization', 'created_by').

needs_optimization.problem: overview() action method (lines 621-762) has critical N+1 issues: Lines 660-676 iterate through recent_procedures and call created_by.user.get_full_name() without select_related. Lines 683-708 loop through UserOrganizationRole objects and call ApprovalStepInstance queries in loop (lines 691-695). Line 715 counts documents without optimization.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related to initial Procedure query. Fetch all user roles with select_related upfront. Use single aggregation for document count. Pre-calculate ApprovalStepInstance counts.

needs_optimization.problem: get_queryset() method (lines 917-921) doesn't use select_related for requester and organization relationships.
needs_optimization.solution: Add select_related('requester', 'organization').

critical_issues.impact: High - iterates through all groups and users without batch loading

critical_issues.issue: DocumentViewSet.recommended() - Complex N+1 in document recommendations
critical_issues.impact: High - multiple nested iterations without prefetch
High - each metric is a separate database roundtrip
High - builds tree recursively triggering query per node
High - loops through procedures/users with unoptimized queries
High - creates alerts in loop instead of bulk_create()

optimization_recommendations.action: Add select_related() to all get_queryset() methods accessing ForeignKey fields
Replace recursive tree-building with prefetch_related and Prefetch objects
Use bulk_create() for batch object creation instead of loops
Combine multiple aggregation queries into single annotate() call
Optimize action methods that perform additional queries without caching
